description: Gamified MOS Word Exam Prep App for Gen-Z students

tasks.title: Project Scaffolding & Design System
tasks.description: Initialize project with package.json, folder structure, CSS design system with Gen-Z aesthetics (gradients, glassmorphism, dark mode, vibrant colors), and base HTML shell.
subtasks: Build CSS design system (tokens, animations, components)

tasks.title: Navigation & App Shell
tasks.description: Build sidebar navigation, top bar with XP display, and page routing system. Sections: Dashboard, Learn, Quizzes, Games, Mock Exam, Practice Exam, My Resources, Settings.
subtasks: Top bar with XP, streak, profile

tasks.title: Dashboard & XP System
tasks.description: Build the main dashboard showing progress rings, XP bar, streak counter, recent activity, and quick-start cards. Implement localStorage-based XP and progress tracking.
subtasks: XP progress bar with level system

tasks.title: Learning Modules (Step-by-Step Guidance)
tasks.description: Create structured learning content covering all MOS Word exam domains: Document Management, Text Formatting, Tables & Lists, References, Graphics, Collaboration. Each section has procedural steps with screenshots/illustrations.

tasks.title: Section Quizzes
tasks.description: Build quiz engine for end-of-section quizzes. Multiple choice, true/false, and scenario-based questions. Instant feedback, score tracking, XP rewards.
subtasks: Quiz data structure and question bank

tasks.title: Gamification Games
tasks.description: Build interactive learning games: Match Question-to-Answer (card matching), Drag-and-Drop ordering, Speed Quiz challenge. XP awarded per game won.

tasks.title: Mock Quiz Section
tasks.description: 20-question mock exams based on real MOS Word scenarios. Non-repeating questions per session. Answer hints on click. Session history for revision.

tasks.title: Custom Resources Section
tasks.description: Allow students to upload/paste study materials. Parse content and auto-generate quizzes from it. Track custom resource quiz scores.
subtasks: File upload and text paste UI

tasks.title: MS Word Integration
tasks.description: Detect and launch Microsoft Word within the app context. Use iframe/embed or COM automation to keep Word accessible without leaving the app.

tasks.title: Practice Exam (Paid Feature)
tasks.description: 50-minute timed exam with 40 non-repeating real-scenario questions. Limited to 2 attempts per payment of 250 NGN via Paystack. Payment tracking without exposing account details.

tasks.title: Backend Server
tasks.description: Express server for payment processing, session management, and serving the app. SQLite database for user data, payment records, and exam attempts.

tasks.title: Testing & Polish
tasks.description: Write tests, fix bugs, add micro-animations, optimize performance, and ensure everything works end-to-end.
